name: I Didn't Sign Up For This

episodes.title: Faith, Cults, and Redemption : A Personal Story
episodes.description:
Peter Young shares his journey as an author, his experience in sports broadcasting, and the personal story behind his memoir. He discusses his involvement in a cult, the impact on his family, and his journey of healing and faith.

Takeaways

* Author's journey from sports broadcasting to writing
* Impact of cult involvement on family and personal faith journey

Chapters

* 00:00 Author's Journey: From Sports Broadcasting to Writing
* 09:48 Involvement in a Cult and Impact on Family
* 19:51 Healing and Faith Journey
